summary: Tested Email Settings and Expense Reminders features. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements working correctly. Email settings tab shows enable toggle, API key input, sender config. Expenses page displays reminders for recurring expenses with 'Mark as Paid' functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/email/settings - Returns email settings (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/email/settings - Updates email settings successfully
Backend: GET /api/email/settings - Returns masked API key after update
Backend: GET /api/expenses/reminders - Returns list of upcoming reminders
Backend: POST /api/expenses/{id}/mark-paid - Updates expense date (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/expenses/{id}/mark-paid - Returns 404 for non-existent expense
Frontend: Settings page loads with Email tab (البريد)
Frontend: Email tab shows enable switch, API key input, sender email/name fields
Frontend: Email tab shows setup instructions in Arabic
Frontend: Email tab has Save button (حفظ الإعدادات) and Test button (إرسال اختباري)
Frontend: Expenses page (/expenses) loads with data-testid='expenses-page'
Frontend: Expenses page shows reminders section (تنبيهات الدفع القادمة) when recurring expenses exist
Frontend: Expenses page shows 'تم الدفع' (Mark as Paid) button in reminders
Frontend: Mark as Paid button works - shows success toast 'تم تسجيل الدفع'
Frontend: Expenses page shows stats cards, category breakdown, and expenses table
seed_data_creation: Test expenses created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email settings and expense reminders features are fully functional. Email settings tab is in Settings page (/settings) under 'البريد' tab. Expenses reminders show at top of /expenses page when recurring expenses are due within reminder_days_before. Mark as paid button calls POST /api/expenses/{id}/mark-paid which updates the expense date for next cycle calculation.

mocked_apis_list: Email sending via Resend - requires actual Resend API key. Test email button (/api/email/test) requires RESEND_API_KEY to be configured.

Email Settings API GET /api/email/settin.details: Returns email configuration with masked API key

Email Settings API PUT /api/email/settin.details: Updates email settings, preserves masked API key if unchanged

Email Settings UI (Settings Page > Email.details: Tab shows enable toggle, Resend API key input, sender email/name, save button, test button, setup instructions

Expense Reminders API GET /api/expenses/.details: Returns list of recurring expenses due within reminder_days_before

Mark Expense Paid API POST /api/expenses.details: Updates expense date to today for next cycle calculation

Expenses Page Reminders Display.details: Shows amber alert banner with upcoming payments, 'Mark as Paid' button per reminder
